title: Project Report: Multi-Agent DevOps Copilot — Agentic AI Engineer
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: Planner + executor + reviewer agents orchestrate deployment tasks via MCP tools with safety constraints.
objectives: MCP tools for git, CI, and logs
Safety: block destructive ops without approval
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Advanced)*

**Multi-Agent DevOps Copilot** is a advanced-level end-to-end project for Agentic AI Engineer. Duration: 5–6 weeks. Planner + executor + reviewer agents orchestrate deployment tasks via MCP tools with safety constraints. Tools: LangGraph, MCP, OpenAI, Langfuse.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: 3 specialized agents (plan, execute, review)
Objective: MCP tools for git, CI, and logs
Objective: Safety: block destructive ops without approval
Objective: Full trace visualization
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Agentic AI Engineer portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Agentic AI Engineer resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Agentic AI Engineer resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Phase: MCP
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: MCP** *(Level: Advanced)*

Connect MCP servers. Complete these tasks: Git tools; CI API; Log reader. Deliverable for this phase: MCP tool catalog.

Code Reference:
```text
- [ ] Git tools
- [ ] CI API
- [ ] Log reader
```
What it shows: Checklist format helps track phase completion.

### What it actually is
Phase MCP is one step in the full project lifecycle.

### When to use it
During week 1 of the project timeline.

### Where to use it
Agentic AI Engineer agile sprints and coursework milestones.

### Real use example
Team demo shows the MCP tool catalog to the teacher.

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Advanced)*

Submit all final deliverables: Multi-agent system; MCP config; Safety tests; Trace demo video. Skills demonstrated: Multi-agent, MCP, Safety. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: Multi-agent system
Deliverable: MCP config
Deliverable: Safety tests
Deliverable: Trace demo video
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits Multi-agent system and passes the rubric.
